glosses.vi: bãi đỗ xe; bãi gửi xe
glosses.hi: पार्किंग; गाड़ी खड़ी करने की जगह
glosses.ja: 駐車場; パーキング

sentences.target: Le parking est plein ce soir.

translations.fr: Le parking est plein ce soir.
translations.en: The parking lot is full tonight.
translations.es: El estacionamiento está lleno esta noche.
translations.de: Der Parkplatz ist heute Abend voll.
translations.pt: O estacionamento está lotado hoje à noite.
translations.vi: Bãi đỗ xe tối nay đã kín chỗ.
translations.hu: A parkoló ma este tele van.
translations.hi: आज रात पार्किंग भरी हुई है.
translations.ro: Parcarea este plină în seara asta.
translations.ja: 今夜は駐車場が満車です。

tokens.explanation: Definite article introducing the masculine singular noun 'parking' as the subject.
Common noun functioning as the subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary (present 3sg) linking the subject 'Le parking' to the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective agreeing in masculine singular with 'parking'.
Demonstrative determiner forming the temporal NP 'ce soir' (tonight).
Noun completing the temporal expression 'ce soir', used as an adverbial time modifier.

sentences.target: On se retrouve au parking devant le cinéma.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ sə ʁətʁuv o paʁkiŋ dəvɑ̃ lə sinema/

translations.fr: On se retrouve au parking devant le cinéma.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ sə ʁətʁuv o paʁkiŋ dəvɑ̃ lə sinema/
translations.en: We’ll meet at the parking lot in front of the cinema.
translations.es: Nos vemos en el estacionamiento frente al cine.
translations.de: Wir treffen uns auf dem Parkplatz vor dem Kino.
translations.it: Ci vediamo al parcheggio davanti al cinema.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在电影院前的停车场见面。
translations.yue: 我哋喺戲院前面嘅停車場見。
translations.pt: Nos encontramos no estacionamento em frente ao cinema.
translations.vi: Chúng ta sẽ gặp nhau ở bãi đỗ xe trước rạp chiếu phim.
translations.ar: سنلتقي في موقف السيارات أمام السينما.
translations.nl: We spreken af op het parkeerterrein voor de bioscoop.
translations.hi: हम सिनेमा के सामने वाली पार्किंग में मिलेंगे.
translations.pl: Spotkamy się na parkingu przed kinem.
translations.el: Θα συναντηθούμε στο πάρκινγκ μπροστά από τον κινηματογράφο.
translations.nb: Vi møtes på parkeringsplassen foran kinoen.
translations.id: Kita bertemu di area parkir depan bioskop.
translations.sv: Vi ses på parkeringen framför biografen.
translations.ro: Ne vedem în parcarea din fața cinematografului.
translations.cs: Sejdeme se na parkovišti před kinem.
translations.da: Vi mødes på parkeringspladsen foran biografen.
translations.ja: 映画館の前の駐車場で会いましょう。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (generic/colloquial 'we'), taking 3rd person singular verb agreement.
Reflexive/reciprocal clitic pronoun marking the pronominal verb 'se retrouver' ('to meet').
Lexical verb in present 3sg; with 'se' forms 'se retrouver' meaning 'to meet up'.
Preposition contracted with the article ('à' + 'le'); introduces the locative complement.
Noun as object of the preposition 'au'.
Preposition introducing an additional locative complement.
Definite article for 'cinéma'.
Noun complement of the preposition 'devant'.

sentences.target: Je cherche ma voiture au parking.

translations.fr: Je cherche ma voiture au parking.
translations.en: I’m looking for my car in the parking lot.
translations.es: Estoy buscando mi coche en el estacionamiento.
translations.de: Ich suche mein Auto auf dem Parkplatz.
translations.it: Sto cercando la mia auto nel parcheggio.
translations.ru: Я ищу свою машину на парковке.
translations.pt: Estou procurando meu carro no estacionamento.
translations.he: אני מחפש את המכונית שלי בחניון.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm xe của tôi ở bãi đỗ xe.
translations.ar: أبحث عن سيارتي في موقف السيارات.
translations.nl: Ik zoek mijn auto op het parkeerterrein.
translations.uk: Я шукаю свою машину на парковці.
translations.hi: मैं पार्किंग में अपनी कार ढूंढ़ रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Ψάχνω το αυτοκίνητό μου στο πάρκινγκ.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter bilen min på parkeringsplassen.
translations.id: Saya sedang mencari mobil saya di area parkir.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter min bil på parkeringen.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter min bil på parkeringspladsen.
translations.ja: 駐車場で自分の車を探しています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
Transitive verb in present 1sg, taking 'ma voiture' as its direct object.
Possessive determiner, feminine singular agreeing with 'voiture'.
Common noun serving as the direct object of 'cherche'.
Preposition contracted with the article ('à' + 'le'), introducing a locative complement.
Noun as the object of the preposition 'au'.

sentences.target: Tu paies le parking à la borne.
sentences.reading: /ty pɛ lə paʁkiŋ a la bɔʁn/

translations.fr: Tu paies le parking à la borne.
translations.ipa: /ty pɛ lə paʁkiŋ a la bɔʁn/
translations.en: You pay for parking at the machine.
translations.es: Pagas el estacionamiento en la máquina.
translations.de: Du bezahlst das Parken am Automaten.
translations.it: Paghi il parcheggio alla cassa automatica.
translations.zh-Hans: 你在缴费机上付停车费。
translations.pt: Você paga o estacionamento na máquina.
translations.vi: Bạn trả phí đỗ xe tại máy thanh toán.
translations.nl: Je betaalt voor het parkeren bij de automaat.
translations.hi: तुम मशीन पर पार्किंग का भुगतान करते हो.
translations.nb: Du betaler for parkering på automaten.
translations.sv: Du betalar för parkeringen vid automaten.
translations.da: Du betaler for parkering ved automaten.
translations.ja: 駐車料金は機械で支払います。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun.
Verb in present 2sg, denoting the action of paying.
Definite article introducing 'parking' as the direct object.
Noun functioning as the direct object of 'paies'; context indicates the parking charge.
Simple preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article (feminine singular) for 'borne'.
Common noun meaning payment machine/kiosk; object of the preposition 'à'.
